rationale: Both ACs satisfied: profile-layout.mjs script and layout-baseline.md report saved under the run-id execution dir; baseline reports max in-degree=10, max out-degree=4, label-width range 95–224 px, and ~5.0 s settle time on the 128-node fixture.

findings.summary: Label widths derived from a per-character approximation rather than browser getBBox; limitation is documented and within ±5% of native rendering, acceptable for an investigation baseline.
Settle wall-clock is compute-only; the report extrapolates browser settle time as 300 × 16.67 ms ≈ 5.0 s. Reasonable lower bound, called out explicitly.
